subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! [3.5s]... ...Thy letter hath arrived. Thou hadst expressed dismay in the face of certain tests. What thou hast said is the truth, but call to mind the verses of the Qur’an
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید جزع و فزع از امتحانات فرموده بودید حق با شماست
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @personal instructions, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort
